subject: Marvin here
body:
Hi,

I'm in Embassy Suites downtown, on north end ave.

I'm on a panel at Pace University tomorrow afternoon, with Buzz Aldrin and Ann Druyan, discussing Kubrick's 2001 movie in a Tribeca Film panel.

Anyway, if JE is around, we'll be here till late Monday.

Best to reach me by email.  either this address or mminsky@gmail.com

Marvin
